title: Rancang Bangun Alarm Pendeteksi Gerakan Berbasis Sensor PIR Menggunakan Mikrokontroller ATMEGA328P
description: Developed a smart monitoring system using IoT technology to collect and analyze real-time environmental data. The system improves monitoring accuracy, enhances operational efficiency, and provides a user-friendly interface for data visualization.

title: Pengubah Arus AC Menjadi DC 12V (Inverter Simetris)
description: Designed and implemented a 12V DC power supply utilizing a center-tapped transformer, bridge rectifier, filtering capacitors, 7812 voltage regulator, and transistor-based current amplification. The system delivers stable and efficient DC output with low ripple characteristics, making it suitable for audio electronics, amplifier systems, mixer consoles, and computer hardware applications.

title: Design Pengembangan Celengan Pintar Berbasis IoT Dengan ESP32 Dan Sensor TCS3200
description: Developed an IoT-enabled smart piggy bank utilizing ESP32 and TCS3200 color sensor technology to automatically identify currency denominations, calculate savings balances, and provide real-time monitoring through OLED displays and Telegram notifications. The system promotes financial literacy and saving habits through an interactive, automated, and transparent user experience.

title: Penetas Telur Puyuh Berbasis PID
description: Developed an automated incubation system utilizing PID control to maintain stable temperature conditions, improving hatch rates and operational efficiency.

title: Pengering Ikan Berbasis PID Dengan Monitoring GUI Matlab
description: Designed a smart drying system with PID-based temperature control and MATLAB GUI monitoring for real-time process visualization and enhanced drying performance.

title: Panel Sistem Boiler PT Phapros Tbk
description: Assisted in the design, assembly, and testing of industrial boiler control panels to support reliable and safe plant utility operations.
